chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7568 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.37305/2015. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025 Mr. Salman Yousuf, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. This is a fiscal matter pending since 2015. Interim orders are operating. Per learned Assistant Attorney General, the assessment has already been done, however, this petition has been filed instead of preferring appeal in the statutory hierarchy, if aggrieved. Counsel for the petitioner remains unable to address the aforesaid. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
